title: Financial Literacy for Founders
shortSummary: The 3 financial statements every founder must understand: P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow. No accounting degree needed.
whyItMatters: If you cannot read a P&L, you cannot run a business. Financial literacy is the difference between informed decisions and guesswork.
coreConcepts: The P&L tells you if you are profitable — revenue minus expenses
The balance sheet tells you what you own and owe at a point in time
The cash flow statement tells you where cash came from and where it went
Profitable companies can still run out of cash — cash flow and profit are different
